message:
fix(quic): RFC 9002 loss_delay_micros and congestion recovery epoch

loss_delay_micros now uses max(latest_rtt, smoothed_rtt) per RFC 9002 §6.1.2
instead of only latest_rtt. Added congestion_recovery_start_time tracking to
prevent double cwnd reduction within the same recovery epoch (RFC 9002 §B.6).
Also removes redundant clippy match arm in h2/error.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ impl ErrorCode {
         match value {
             0x0 => Self::NoError,
             0x1 => Self::ProtocolError,
-            0x2 => Self::InternalError,
+            // 0x2 (InternalError) handled by wildcard below
             0x3 => Self::FlowControlError,
             0x4 => Self::SettingsTimeout,
             0x5 => Self::StreamClosed,
